title: Amethyst
description: A complete overhaul of performance/qol for minecraft. You will find yourself overwhelmed in the features this modpack has to offer. 3 - 4 gb of ram reccommended for minimum gc stutter.
body:
A complete overhaul of vanilla minecraft's performance and qol.
Think fabulously optimized on crack and steroids. This modpack is so fine tuned, you'll hardly find anything better. It has all the bells and whistles. Some of the mods are:

- **betterf3**
- **camera tweaks**
- **zoomify**
- **continuity**
- **cubes without borders**
- **smooth scrolling**
- **not enough animations**
- **remove reloading screen**
- **and much more...**

The best part? It's got **preconfigured settings!** These are (_in my opinion_) the perfect settings. If you feel the need to change some of them, go ahead! But you'll most likely be happy with leaving them on.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**
**Zoomify conflicts with camera tweaks**, so it's best to leave the camera tweaks zoom feature unassigned or assigned a different key than zoomify's zoom feature.

Vanilla tweaks link:
https://vanillatweaks.net
